raw_consumer_statement: ON XX/XX/XXXX I RECEIVED A CHARGE OF {$1800.00} ON MY CREDIR CARD NUMBER ENDING IN XXXX. I DISPUTED THE CHARGE AND RECEIVED A NEW CARD ENDING IN XXXX. THE DISPUTE WAS DENIED ON XX/XX/XXXX BY XXXXITIBANK. I SENT A CERTIFIED LETTER WITH MY ATTORNEY ON XX/XX/XXXX. I HAVE NOT RECEIVED ANY RESPONSE
